offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual bookkeeping causes errors that lead to cash flow gaps. We automate workflows instead of manual bookkeeping methods.
problem: manual bookkeeping processes lead to errors and inefficiencies
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on bookkeeping solutions

try_it: Let users try invoice tracking and expense categorization on 1-3 items

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
